title: Support - App, user not logged ever, dialog
scenario: Guest user in Poly Studio Mobile app is prompted to log in with Poly Lens account when tapping App button in Support via hamburger menu
steps: 2. Launch the app and complete onboarding by selecting "Go as Guest".
3. On the Home screen, tap the hamburger menu (☰) in the top-left corner.
5. On the Support screen, tap the "App" button.
expected: A dialog is displayed prompting the user to log in with their Poly Lens account. The dialog includes "Later" and "Login" buttons.
